title: Political rally in Tarari draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Tarari promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: High stakes battle in Tarari as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Tarari. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.
